title: 信息日报 2026-07-09

headline.title: 哈佛科学家将硅芯片变为 DNA 写入机
headline.summary: 哈佛大学研究团队利用电力和水基酶，在硅芯片上同时合成数十条 DNA 序列，为传统 DNA 制造提供更清洁的替代方案。该突破有望催生便携式 DNA 写入设备乃至大规模 DNA 数据存储，但规模化仍需新的化学方法。
headline.title_en: Harvard scientists turn a silicon chip into a DNA writing machine
headline.summary_en: Harvard scientists have created a silicon chip that can write dozens of DNA sequences simultaneously using electricity and water-based enzymes, offering a cleaner alternative to conventional DNA manufacturing. The breakthrough could eventually support portable DNA-writing devices and massive DNA data storage, though new chemistry is needed to scale.
headline.original_title: Harvard scientists turn a silicon chip into a DNA writing machine
headline.reason: 该成果融合材料科学、生物工程和微电子，代表交叉领域重大突破，具有广泛科学意义和潜在产业影响，适合作为今日头条。
headline.reason_en: This breakthrough combines materials science, bioengineering, and microelectronics, representing a major interdisciplinary advance with broad scientific significance and potential industrial impact, making it the lead story.
